metadata.title: FTL Jub
metadata.author: Hephalumpo, JubJub
metadata.description:
This addon adds some missions and ships relating to JubJub
- (0.1.00) Added the Jubship and the Soviet Lunar Ship - (0.1.18) Added JubJub as a character - (0.1.26) Added Dung Magnet Augment - (0.1.36) Added Ship Unlock Images for Jubship
